data.title: Comparison of Azithromycin or Clarithromycin in 3drugs Protocol of H-pylori Eradication Regimen
data.brief_summary: The Aim of this study is comparison between two regimens containing clarithromycinand azithromycin.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* patients with peptic ulcer due to H-pylori confirmed endoscopy and biopsy

Exclusion Criteria:

* patients who got H-pylori eradication treatment previously
* patients who used study drugs during 3months before study
data.sponsor: Shahid Sadoughi University of Medical Sciences and Health Services
